attached_docs: KFM Markdown Engineering, Modernization & GitHub Documentation Implementation Agent v5.0.0
Kansas Frontier Matrix — AI Build Operating Contract.md

validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, current main, permissions, target baseline, Directory Rules, contribution guidance, review routing, Makefile, release lane indexes, release workflows, and receipt schema were inspected.
PR #1545 was merged and current main matched its merge commit; no open pull request or matching release-README branch was surfaced before the campaign claim.
The existing release/README.md remains under the canonical release-governance root; provenance remains under data/receipts/generated/; no root, lane, lifecycle phase, or authority home changes.

The complete 292-line v1 baseline was reviewed; stable identity, release/data boundary, lifecycle, lane index, responsibilities, finite states, record fields, template, checklist, naming, verification, and last-reviewed content were preserved or reconciled.

The README was reconciled with current rollback, rollback-card, withdrawal, signature, correction, manifest, review, decision, workflow, Makefile, CODEOWNERS, and ADR evidence while preserving unresolved lane semantics.
The twelve required Directory Rules §15 H2 sections appear first and in the exact required order.
MarkdownIt parsed the document; one H1, balanced fences, unique custom anchors, resolved internal fragments, linked static badges, and final newline were verified.
Repository-relative destinations were checked against current fetched files, workflow requirements, or repository search results.
No private key, common GitHub/AWS/OpenAI token pattern, credential, private endpoint, living-person record, DNA/genomic content, or restricted precise location was introduced.
Remote bytes are verified after the review branch is written.
Required fields, enums, hashes, timestamps, path closure, human-review state, citations, and notes were checked against the fetched GENERATED_RECEIPT schema.

Documentation/provenance-only packet; no release code, schema, contract, policy, fixture, validator, workflow, candidate, decision, rollback execution, runtime, deployment, or public behavior changes.
Repository workflow outcomes are observed after draft pull-request creation and are unavailable at receipt emission time.

notes: AI-authored documentation/provenance update on a focused review branch. The release root README is reconciled with current lane indexes, Makefile readiness markers, release-dry-run, promotion-gate, rollback-drill, CODEOWNERS, Directory Rules, and unresolved ADR/lane boundaries. It does not satisfy GAP-WF-RELEASE-001 and changes no executable release, promotion, rollback, correction, publication, deployment, source, schema, policy, fixture, validator, candidate, decision, or public behavior. Human review remains pending; this receipt is process provenance, not approval, truth proof, release authority, or publication authority.
